title: Carla McGhee: From Peoria to Olympic Gold
story: Carla McGhee bounced into the world in Peoria, Illinois in 1968. This future basketball star would go on to shine at the University of Tennessee, helping her team clinch NCAA Championships in 1987 and 1989. But McGhee's biggest triumph came on March 6, 1996, when she and her teammates captured Olympic gold in women's basketball.
follow_up_question: What other sports have you tried or would like to try?

title: A Star's Voice Rises in South Africa
story: In a small town called Piet Retief, a musical star was born. Pretty Yende came into the world in 1985, destined to become a famous opera singer. Her powerful voice would one day fill grand theaters, but it all began on March 6 in South Africa. Pretty grew up to dazzle audiences as a soprano, sharing her talent far beyond her hometown.
activity_question: What type of singer is Pretty Yende?
follow_up_question: Do you know what makes a soprano voice special?
